5_smallest_safe_implementation.answer: Option B (dedicated Remove match) + rejectIngredientMatchPair + delete price_history row for that invoice+ingredient + session suppress

7_would_no_match_have_prevented_pepino.answer: PARTIALLY — prevention depends on timing and cleanup depth

if_no_match_before_bidfood_extract.reason: Extract runs syncOperationalIngredientCostsFromInvoiceLines immediately after insert (~line 1358) with no user review gate. Pepino matched kind:exact → confirmed → auto-sync before any UI interaction.

if_no_match_after_extract_with_pair_reje.reason: rejectIngredientMatchPair would block future matcher; history row a689bd91 and current_price already written

if_no_match_after_extract_with_full_clea.reason: reject pair + delete history row + revert current_price removes contamination from Pepino conserva chain

if_extract_sync_gated_option_C.reason: exact match would stay suggested/unconfirmed; no auto history write until user confirms

evidence_summary: Live query: Pepino displayState=confirmed, kind=exact, wouldSyncOnExtract=true
No alias for 'Pepino' alone — 6 aliases all jar product names
Price history a689bd91: new_price=0.00177 from fresh €1.77/kg line
identity-expansion-simulation: canonical tier marks Pepino→Pepino conserva as SAFE (matcher blind spot)
identity-contamination-audit: unit_family_mismatch guard breaks chain — human review was correct fix
7_would_no_match_have_prevented_pepino.verdict: UI 'No match' alone at review time would NOT have prevented initial contamination without either (a) gating extract sync or (b) post-hoc history cleanup. Full remove-match with cleanup WOULD fix Pepino and prevent re-link.

overall_recommendation.ship: Option B + history cleanup (smallest safe user-facing fix)
overall_recommendation.follow_up: Option C extract sync gate (structural prevention)
overall_recommendation.pepino_remediation: Remove match on Bidfood Pepino line + delete history a689bd91 + reject pair (635a1189)
